description: Fix filter state. Actual behavior: Clearing one filter currently clears every active filter. Expected behavior: Clearing one filter should preserve unrelated filters. Existing failing test: `FilterPanel preserves unrelated filters when one filter is cleared`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.

Fix form validation. Actual behavior: Submitting a form with whitespace-only required fields is accepted. Expected behavior: Whitespace-only values should be treated as empty and show the existing validation message. Existing failing test: `EditForm rejects whitespace-only required fields`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.

Fix pagination controls. Actual behavior: Clicking Next on the last page still increments the page index. Expected behavior: Next should be disabled at the last page and keep the current page unchanged. Existing failing test: `Pagination does not advance past the final page`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.

Fix table sort toggling. Actual behavior: Clicking the active sort column never cycles back to an unsorted state. Expected behavior: The third click should clear sorting and restore the default row order. Existing failing test: `DataTable cycles sort direction back to unsorted`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.

Fix route parameter handling. Actual behavior: Opening a details route with a URL-encoded id requests the encoded value literally. Expected behavior: The route should decode the id before passing it to the API client. Existing failing test: `details route decodes encoded ids before loading`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.

Fix table sort toggling. Actual behavior: Clicking the active sort column never cycles back to an unsorted state. Expected behavior: The third click should clear sorting and restore the default row order. Existing failing test: `DataTable cycles sort direction back to unsorted`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.

Fix empty-state rendering. Actual behavior: The empty state flashes while data is still loading. Expected behavior: The empty state should render only after loading completes with zero rows. Existing failing test: `EmptyState is hidden while the list is loading`. Keep the patch focused on the listed files and leave verification to the configured commands.
